description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a rectangular footprint and a minimalist design. The exterior features a combination of gray and natural wood paneling, with large windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The property includes a landscaped yard with hedges, trees, and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. A spacious outdoor area at the rear features a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a shaded patio with seating. The house appears to be a single story, with a strong emphasis on open-plan living and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and contemporary, with an emphasis on horizontal lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, gray and wood paneling, large windows, and a backyard pool with patio seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, gray and wood facade, and landscaped hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and outdoor seating under a shaded structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, sun loungers, and the open patio area adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, additional greenery, and the flat roof design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, minimal steps, and a paved walkway flanked by hedges; no porch or overhang.
